product_overview: UpNext is a real-time collaborative music queue where an authenticated host creates and runs a live room and anonymous participants join by a 6-character code or invite URL to add, vote, and listen to tracks together. The host controls playback in the host view while participants interact with queue, voting, and people/history views.
core_goals: Allow a host to sign up or log in, create a live session, and control playback for a crowd.
Let anonymous participants join a session using a 6-character code or full invite URL and set a display name.
Enable participants to add tracks (search / YouTube / Spotify), upvote tracks, and affect queue ordering in real time.
Provide easy invitation sharing (copyable invite link) and a simple view of who is in the room and what has played.

features.name: Host Sign-up
features.description: Create a new host account (display name, email, password) and land on the authenticated host dashboard on success. Duplicate-email errors surface via toast.
user_flows: Navigate to /host/auth -> Switch to Sign-up tab -> Fill display name -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit sign-up form -> See authenticated dashboard with Welcome heading
Navigate to /host/auth -> Switch to Sign-up tab -> Fill display name -> Fill an email already in use -> Fill password -> Submit sign-up form -> See duplicate-email error toast

features.name: Host Login
features.description: Authenticate an existing host with email and password; successful login shows the host dashboard and stores the host JWT in localStorage. Invalid credentials surface a specific toast.
user_flows: Navigate to /host/auth -> Ensure Login tab active -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> See authenticated dashboard with Welcome heading
Navigate to /host/auth -> Ensure Login tab active -> Fill email -> Fill wrong password -> Submit login form -> See toast 'Invalid email or password.'

features.name: Host Logout
features.description: Sign out the authenticated host, clear host JWT, and return to the auth gate.
user_flows: Start authenticated at /host/auth -> Trigger logout action -> See login/signup form again

features.name: Create Host Session from Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated host creates a fresh session; the UI shows a transient Creating... state and then lands the host in the host session view with a visible join code.
user_flows: Start authenticated at /host/auth -> Trigger Host a session -> Observe Creating... label while pending -> Land on the new host session view and observe join code present

features.name: Previous Sessions List (Host Dashboard)
features.description: Host dashboard lists previously-created sessions with Live/Ended badges and participant counts; hosts can open an active dashboard or view an ended room and retry on load failure.
user_flows: Start authenticated at /host/auth -> View previous sessions list -> Open an active session dashboard from the list -> Open an ended room view from the list
Start authenticated at /host/auth -> View previous sessions list -> If loading failed use Retry to re-fetch the list

features.name: Join Room via Landing Modal (6-char code)
features.description: From the landing page, open the Join Room modal, enter a 6-character code (displayed uppercased) and pre-validate the session before proceeding to the participant pre-join screen. Validation failures show inline messages.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type a valid 6-character code -> Continue -> See the participant pre-join screen for that code
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type an invalid/ unparsable input -> Continue -> See inline error 'Please enter a valid URL.'
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Type a valid 6-character code that does not exist -> Continue -> See inline error 'Session not found for code {CODE}'

features.name: Join Room via Landing Modal (full invite URL)
features.description: Join Room modal accepts a full invite URL (including /session/{CODE}/join or ?code={CODE}) up to 512 characters and pre-validates identically to raw codes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Paste a full invite URL containing the join code -> Continue -> See the participant pre-join screen for that code
Navigate to / -> Open Join Room modal -> Paste a non-parseable string longer than allowed or without a code -> Continue -> See inline error 'Please enter a valid URL.'

features.name: Participant Pre-Join Screen
features.description: Shows host/room info, listener count, and a name input; on submit the guest UUID and display name are persisted to localStorage and the participant proceeds into the live session.
user_flows: Open participant pre-join screen for a valid code -> View host card and listener count -> Type a display name -> Submit Enter the Gallery -> Persist guest UUID and display name to localStorage -> Land in the participant live session view
Open participant pre-join screen for an invalid code -> Observe text 'Session not found for code {CODE}'

features.name: Participant Live Session — Add Track (search and URLs)
features.description: Participants add tracks via a text query (search suggestions), a YouTube URL, or a Spotify URL. Search suggestions are keyboard-navigable and submitting adds the selection to the queue; invalid/unresolvable URLs surface an error toast.
user_flows: Open participant live session -> Type a search query in the Add to Queue input -> Use ArrowDown / ArrowUp to navigate suggestions -> Press Enter to add the highlighted suggestion -> See the queue update with the new track
Open participant live session -> Paste a valid YouTube URL into the Add to Queue input -> Submit Add Track -> See the queue update with the added YouTube track
Open participant live session -> Paste an invalid or unresolvable track URL -> Submit Add Track -> See an error toast and no new queue entry

features.name: Participant Live Session — Upvote
features.description: Participants toggle upvotes on queued tracks; vote state shows visually and vote counts and queue ordering update live.
user_flows: Open participant live session -> Toggle upvote on a queued track -> See the vote count change and the upvote state filled -> Observe queue reorder according to votes

features.name: Participant Edit Display Name
features.description: Participants edit their display name during a session; empty or whitespace-only names are rejected and surface an error toast.
user_flows: Open participant live session -> Open edit-name dialog -> Replace current name with a valid non-empty name -> Save -> See header reflect the new name and People list update
Open participant live session -> Open edit-name dialog -> Replace name with empty or whitespace-only value -> Save -> See error toast about invalid name

features.name: Participant Invite Friends Modal
features.description: Participants open an invite modal to copy the session invite path; Copy Link cycles to Copied on success and resets after a short interval; the modal is closable via X.
user_flows: Open participant live session -> Open Invite Friends modal -> Click Copy Link -> See Copied state then see it reset after a short interval -> Close the modal via X

features.name: Participant History and People Views
features.description: History shows previously played tracks (or an empty state) and People lists current members with the host indicated by a Host badge derived from sessionHost logic.
user_flows: Open participant live session -> Switch to History view -> See 'No songs played yet.' when empty or a list of past tracks when available -> Switch to People view -> See members list with the host showing a Host badge

features.name: Host Session View — Live Layout and Live Feed
features.description: Authenticated host in a live session sees now-playing, Live Feed, queue, Invite panel, and a floating playback dock; the YouTube player iframe mounts only when a playable currentVideoId exists (not on fresh empty sessions).
user_flows: Authenticate and create/open a host session -> Land on the host session view -> Observe now-playing placeholder, Live Feed entries, queue, and Invite your crowd panel -> Verify YouTube player is not mounted when no currentVideoId is present

features.name: Host Settings Modal — Create New Session
features.description: From the host session Settings modal the host can create a new session; the action shows a Creating... state and navigates the host to the new host session view with the new join code on success.
user_flows: Open the host session view -> Open Settings -> Trigger Create new session -> Observe Creating... label while pending -> Land on the new host session view with its join code

features.name: Host Settings Modal — Stop Session and Ended Recap
features.description: Host can Stop Session from the Settings modal; while stopping the button shows Stopping..., the modal closes, and the host view renders an inline EndedHostSessionRecap with 'Session Ended' plus participants and songs played. Stop controls are no longer reachable in the recap state.
user_flows: Open the host session view -> Open Settings -> Trigger Stop Session -> Observe Stopping... label while pending -> See inline EndedHostSessionRecap with 'Session Ended' and lists of participants and songs played -> Verify Stop Session control is no longer reachable

routes.description: Landing page with hero, marketing bento grid, Get Started CTA, and Join Room modal trigger.
Host entry. Renders HostAuthGate (login/signup form) when no JWT present, otherwise renders HostEntryPage dashboard with welcome and previous sessions list.
Participant pre-join screen. [id] is treated as the 6-char join code. Validates session via GET /sessions/:code, prompts for display name, then routes to /session/{uuid}.
Participant live session view. Sidebar with Live Session, History, People views, plus Invite Friends button. Edit-name dialog and session-ended state included.

Host live session view (host JWT required). Sidebar with Live Session, History, People, Settings. Includes Live Feed, queue, Invite panel, floating playback dock, YouTube player (mounts only when currentVideoId set), and Settings modal with Create new session and Stop Session controls. After stop, renders EndedHostSessionRecap inline.

features.name: Host Sign-up
features.description: Create a new host account using display name, email, password. Errors surfaced via toast (no inline banner). Backend returns EmailAlreadyInUse on duplicate email.
user_interactions: On duplicate email see error toast

features.name: Host Login
features.description: Login with email and password. Stores JWT under upnext.host.token in localStorage. Invalid credentials produce toast 'Invalid email or password.'
user_interactions: Fill email and password on Login tab
On invalid credentials see error toast
On success see authenticated dashboard with Welcome heading

features.name: Host Logout
features.description: Logout button on host dashboard clears JWT and returns to HostAuthGate.

features.name: Create Host Session from Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated host clicks Host a session, server creates a session, frontend stores join code and navigates to /session/{id}/host?code={joinCode}. Button label becomes Creating... while pending.
user_interactions: Land on host session view with visible join code in URL and header

features.name: Previous Sessions List
features.description: Host dashboard renders previous sessions with Live or Ended badge and participant count. Each row has Open dashboard (active) or View room (ended). Empty and error (Retry) states present.
user_interactions: Click Open dashboard or View room
Click Retry if list fails to load

features.name: Join via Landing Modal (6-char code)
features.description: From landing, Join Link opens modal. Accepts 6-char alphanumeric code. Pre-validates via GET /sessions/:code. Routes to /session/{CODE}/join on success.
user_interactions: Click Continue (label becomes Checking... while pending)
On invalid format see 'Please enter a valid URL.'
On nonexistent code see 'Session not found for code {CODE}'

features.name: Join via Landing Modal (full invite URL)
features.description: Modal also accepts full invite URL containing /session/{CODE}/join or ?code={CODE}. maxLength 512. Same preflight validation.

features.name: Participant Pre-Join Screen
features.description: Shows session host card 'Curated by {hostName}', listener count, name input, and Enter the Gallery button. While loading, button label becomes 'Checking room...'. Persists guest UUID + display name to upnext.guest.* localStorage on submit, then routes to /session/{uuid}.
user_interactions: On invalid code see 'Session not found for code {CODE}'

features.name: Participant Live Session - Add Track
features.description: Add to Queue card accepts text query, YouTube URL, or Spotify URL. Search query produces keyboard-navigable suggestion dropdown (ArrowUp/Down/Enter). Submitting adds to queue via WS ADD_SONG. Invalid URLs surface error toast.
user_interactions: Type query in Add to Queue input
Use ArrowDown / ArrowUp to navigate suggestions
Press Enter to add highlighted suggestion
Or paste YouTube/Spotify URL and click Add Track
Observe queue update or error toast

features.name: Participant Live Session - Upvote
features.description: Each queue row has an upvote button that toggles. Filled state when votedByMe is true. Vote counts and queue order update live via WebSocket.
user_interactions: Click upvote on a queued track
See filled icon and count change

features.name: Participant Edit Display Name
features.description: Pencil icon next to 'Joined as {name}' opens dialog. Save commits name via WS UPDATE_NAME. Empty/whitespace-only name rejected by backend with error toast.
user_interactions: On empty/whitespace-only name see error toast

features.name: Participant Invite Friends Modal
features.description: Sidebar Invite Friends button opens modal with invite path and Copy Link. Button states cycle Copy Link to Copied to reset (~1.6s). On failure Retry plus toast 'Could not copy link. Please copy manually.' Closed via X.

features.name: Participant History and People Views
features.description: History view lists previously played songs (empty state 'No songs played yet.'). People view lists Members Joined; host shown with Host badge derived from sessionHost helper.
user_interactions: Verify Host badge appears for host user

features.name: Participant Session-Closed Screen
features.description: When WS reports SessionExpired or SessionNotFound, the page renders 'Host ended this session' with Go Home and Create Your Own Session CTAs. Sidebar/queue not rendered.
user_interactions: Observe Host ended this session screen
Click Go Home then land on /
Click Create Your Own Session then land on /host/auth

features.name: Host Session View - Layout and Live Feed
features.description: Host live view shows now-playing card, Live Feed (jam events), queue, and Invite your crowd panel with Copy Link. Floating playback dock with play/pause/skip; disabled until currentVideoId present.
user_interactions: View Live Feed entries (joined the jam, started the jam, voted for ...)
Use Copy Link in Invite your crowd panel
Verify YouTube player NOT mounted before any track plays

features.name: Host Settings Modal - Create New Session
features.description: Settings sidebar item opens Host Settings modal. Create new session triggers POST /sessions/. Label becomes Creating... while pending. On success navigates to new /session/{newId}/host?code={newCode}.
user_interactions: Land on new host session view

features.name: Host Settings Modal - Stop Session
features.description: Stop Session calls POST /sessions/by-id/:sessionId/stop. Label becomes Stopping... while pending. On success modal closes, host re-routes to same URL which resolves to EndedHostSessionRecap (Session Ended heading, participants list, songs played).
user_interactions: Verify Stop Session control no longer reachable

known_limitations.issue: No authenticated participant accounts; guest identity uses localStorage UUID.
known_limitations.impact: Guest identity is per-browser only. Cannot test cross-device guest persistence.

known_limitations.issue: YouTube player iframe does NOT auto-mount on session creation.
known_limitations.impact: Tests must NOT assert player presence on a fresh empty session.

known_limitations.issue: Host dashboard at /host/auth has no Settings panel, sidebar, Stop Session, queue, player, or invite link.
Host auth errors are toast-only, no inline banner.
known_limitations.impact: Tests must assert toast body, not inline text.

known_limitations.issue: Landing Features, How It Works, View Demo are inert marketing buttons.
known_limitations.impact: Do not assert navigation on these.

known_limitations.issue: Headless Chromium clipboard APIs may flake.
known_limitations.impact: Copy Link to Copied assertion needs a retry window.

known_limitations.issue: Session join codes expire after 12h; reuse across runs causes false negatives.
known_limitations.impact: Tests must always create a fresh session.

known_limitations.issue: Transient WS connection errors are debounced ~1.2s and suppressed if reconnected.
known_limitations.impact: Do not assert immediate connection-error toast on first blip.
